items.title: Save almost $200 on a flagship AMD 9850X3D CPU and 9070 XT GPU with this Newegg combo bundle — AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D and Radeon RX 9070 XT can be yours at a great price
items.description: If you've been looking to build a 4K-ready but the prices during the AI boom has scared you off, we've got just the deal to start you off. You can grab AMD's top-tier Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU and RX 9070 XT GPU for less than $1,000 right now on Newegg. You're getting a combined savings of almost $200 across both items.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter PC building might be going through a tumultuous period right now, but that doesn't mean the deals have stopped. Even the RAM amidst a RAM crisis can be found bundled with CPUs and a motherboard for cheap, but what about the graphics cards? GPUs are still the most expensive part of a gaming rig and, as such, we've hunted down an awesome, flagship-tier combo for you. You can get AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D processor with a Radeon RX 9070 XT bundled for just $978 on Newegg right now. Check out this deal on Newegg Save $196Intel CPU GPU Combo - AMD RYZEN 7 9850X3D with ASRock RX9070XT CL 16G: was $1,174.98 now $978.98 at NeweggAll-time low priceThis incredible deal at Newegg right now brings together the 9850X3D with the RX 9070 XT, a potent duo for a 4K-ready gaming PC and one that'll save you nearly $200 in total.View Deal The RX 9070 XT needs no introduction; it sits at the very top of our best GPUs roundup because it's a great GPU for 1440p and even 4K gaming. In traditional raster, it pretty much matches the RTX 5070 Ti across all resolutions, and is only about 10% slower when it comes to ray-traced workloads. Nvidia does have a richer driver suite with things like DLSS 4.5 (and the dreaded DLSS 5 on the way) and RTX HDR, but AMD's FSR 4 isn't far behind anymore.The RX 9070 XT has an MSRP of $600, which it rarely sits at. You're getting an ASRock Challenger variant in this bundle that costs $700 on its own right now. Like every other RX 9070 XT, this one has 64x RDNA 4-based Compute Units with 16GB of GDDR6 memory saturated across a 256-bit wide bus to deliver a 640 GB/s bandwidth. So, if you take into account the $200 in savings, you're essentially getting this card for just $500! Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware) Moving on to the other half of the deal, the Ryzen 9 9850X3D is a powerhouse of a CPU, featuring 8 cores and 16 threads backed up by 96MB of X3D-powered L3 cache. The chip is clocked at 4.7 GHz but can boost up to 5.6 GHz thanks to the 3D V-Cache being stacked underneath the CCDs on Zen 5. The 9850X3D is the best performing processor we've ever tested in gaming, faster than even the recently launched 9950X3D2.It retails for $500, but can be found for a little less across retailers — Newegg has it for $475 at the moment. If you actually track the price for both the CPU and GPU on PCPartPicker, the lowest price for either totals out to $1,060, which means paying just $978.98 on Newegg is still saving you money, technically making this an all-time low. So, go grab this deal before stock runs out and resume your PC building ambitions during the AI boom! If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: Newegg套装大促：旗舰AMD 9850X3D处理器与9070 XT显卡组合直降近200美元——AMD Ryzen 9 9850X3D和Radeon RX 9070 XT超值入手
items.descriptionZh:
Newegg近日推出了一款极具性价比的旗舰级PC硬件组合套装：将AMD Ryzen 9 9850X3D处理器与Radeon RX 9070 XT显卡捆绑销售，售价仅为978.98美元，相比单独购买节省了近200美元（原价1174.98美元）。在当前显卡价格依然高企、内存市场波动的背景下，这一组合为追求4K游戏体验的玩家提供了难得的入手机会。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
套装中的RX 9070 XT显卡基于AMD最新的RDNA 4架构，配备64个计算单元，搭载16GB GDDR6显存，通过256-bit位宽实现640 GB/s的带宽。该卡在传统光栅化性能上几乎与NVIDIA RTX 5070 Ti持平，仅光线追踪性能落后约10%。AMD的FSR 4超分辨率技术虽不及NVIDIA DLSS 4.5（以及即将到来的DLSS 5）和RTX HDR在驱动生态上的丰富度，但差距已显著缩小。处理器方面，Ryzen 9 9850X3D采用Zen 5架构，8核心16线程，核心创新在于将96MB的3D V-Cache堆叠在CCD下方，使L3缓存达到96MB，基础频率4.7 GHz，加速频率可达5.6 GHz。这一设计大幅降低了游戏中的数据延迟，使其成为Tom's Hardware测试过的游戏性能最强的处理器，甚至比近期发布的9950X3D2还要快。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
- **显卡**：RX 9070 XT官方建议零售价（MSRP）为600美元，但市场上实际售价常高于此。本套装中的ASRock Challenger版本单独售价为700美元，套装折扣后相当于仅花500美元购得。  
- **处理器**：Ryzen 9 9850X3D单独零售价为500美元，Newegg目前标价475美元。  
- **总价对比**：若在PCPartPicker上分别购买这两款硬件，最低总价为1060美元，而套装价978.98美元确实达到了历史新低。  
- **竞品对标**：RX 9070 XT在4K和1440P分辨率下表现优异，光栅化性能与RTX 5070 Ti旗鼓相当；CPU则在游戏负载中超越所有此前测试的型号，包括旗舰级9950X3D2。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
该组合瞄准高端游戏PC构建，尤其适合需要4K分辨率下流畅运行3A大作、同时要求处理器响应迅速的电竞玩家或内容创作者。得益于3D V-Cache技术，9850X3D在CPU密集型模拟、即时战略等游戏中优势明显；而RX 9070 XT的16GB大显存和RDNA 4架构，能应对高分辨率纹理和未来光追游戏需求。对于预算有限但渴望旗舰性能的用户，这一套装省下的近200美元可直接用于升级存储或散热设备。不过需注意，该优惠库存有限，建议有意者尽快下单。若需进一步节省开支，可关注Tom's Hardware提供的更多SSD、硬盘、显示器、显卡及CPU优惠页面。

items.title: Samsung's $400,000 payout for memory workers sparks revolt as other divisions get only $4,000, fueling intentional production slowdowns — internal resentment disrupts packaging operations, major AI chip project decisions to a complete halt
items.description: It’s understood that meetings are being canceled across Samsung's non-memory and shared business units.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 1 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Samsung's tentative profit-sharing deal with its largest labor union averted an 18-day strike just days ago, but the agreement has triggered internal conflict that’s now threatening the company's ability to ship AI memory on schedule, according to a Seoul Economic Daily report published yesterday.It’s understood that meetings are being canceled across Samsung's non-memory and shared business units. That work negligence has become widespread in the foundry and TSP (Test & Package) divisions, which handle the back-end packaging and testing work essential to producing high-bandwidth memory. One source told the publication that “decision-making on major projects has come to a complete halt,” as inter-departmental resentment deepens over the bonus gap.This disruption in TSP could be especially consequential for Samsung as it looks to ramp up its HBM4 production for Nvidia’s next-gen Rubin AI accelerators. TSP uses an integrated turnkey system that routes chips through its own foundry and packaging lines, and any slowdown in back-end operations will directly constrain HBM output as all three major memory producers are racing to fulfill hyperscaler orders.Latest Videos From You may like Samsung meeting transcripts show memory workers offered incredible 607% bonus worth $477,000, while logic chip staff get as little as 50% Samsung chip workers reject $340,000 one-time bonus, demand annual payouts like SK hynix's $900,000 Union rally causes Samsung fab production to plummet by 58% during night shift as workers demand up to $400,000 bonuses Another source speaking to the publication warned that continued negligence on production and verification lines could damage Samsung's customer relationships and jeopardize delivery commitments.The root of the conflict is a massive disparity in proposed payouts. Under the tentative deal, employees in Samsung's memory division stand to receive bonuses of roughly 600 million won (~$400,000). In contrast, workers in the DX (Device eXperience) division, which covers smartphones, TVs, and home appliances, would receive approximately 6 million won (~$4,000). The deal allocates 10.5% of the semiconductor division's operating profit as stock-based bonuses, with an additional 1.5% in cash.Workers outside the memory unit have pushed back hard, with a smaller union representing DX employees filing a court injunction this week to block the larger, chip-dominated union from handling collective bargaining. That union's membership surged from 3,000 to nearly 13,000 after the deal was announced. Separately, the Korea Shareholder Action Headquarters has threatened legal action, arguing the profit-linked bonus structure requires shareholder approval under Korean law.Union members began casting electronic ballots on Friday, with voting open through May 27. Ratification requires participation from more than half of eligible members and a majority yes vote, but approximately 43,000 non-memory union members within the DS division could swing the outcome. According to reports from Korea, internal message boards have shown strong opposition from workers who view the deal as favoring the memory unit at everyone else's expense.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsSamsung's semiconductor CEO, Jun Young-hyun, urged employees in an internal memo Thursday to move past the conflict, but the dispute now poses a tangible risk to Samsung during what Bloomberg estimates will be a record year, with 2026 operating profit projected at 330 trillion won (~$218 billion). Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: 三星向内存工人支付40万美元奖金引发反抗，其他部门仅获4000美元，导致故意放慢生产速度——内部不满扰乱
items.descriptionZh:
三星与其最大工会达成的临时利润分享协议近日成功避免了一场持续18天的罢工，然而这一协议却引发了内部激烈冲突，据《首尔经济日报》昨日报道，这正威胁着三星按时交付AI内存的能力。据了解，三星非内存及共享业务部门的会议纷纷被取消，这种工作懈怠在负责高带宽内存（HBM）后端封装与测试的晶圆代工（Foundry）和TSP（测试与封装）部门已变得普遍。一位消息人士透露，“重大项目的决策已完全停滞”，部门间因奖金差距而产生的对立情绪日益加深。TSP环节的中断对三星尤为关键，因为它正计划为英伟达下一代Rubin AI加速器大规模生产HBM4内存。TSP采用一体化交钥匙系统，芯片需经过自有晶圆厂和封装线串联处理，后端运营的任何放缓都将直接限制HBM产出，而当前三大内存厂商正竞相满足超大规模数据中心客户的订单。

消息人士警告称，生产和验证线上的持续懈怠可能损害三星的客户关系，并危及交货承诺。冲突根源在于拟议奖金金额的巨大差异：根据临时协议，三星内存部门员工可获得约6亿韩元（约合40万美元）的奖金，而设备体验（DX）部门（涵盖智能手机、电视和家电）的员工仅能获得约600万韩元（约合4000美元）。协议规定，半导体部门营业利润的10.5%以股票形式发放奖金，另加1.5%现金。非内存部门员工强烈反对，代表DX员工的一个较小工会本周已向法院申请禁令，阻止由芯片部门主导的大型工会进行集体谈判。该大型工会的会员数在协议公布后从3000人激增至近13000人。此外，韩国股东行动总部威胁采取法律行动，认为这种与利润挂钩的奖金结构根据韩国法律需要股东批准。

工会成员于周五开始电子投票，至5月27日结束。批准需超过半数合格成员参与且多数赞成，但DS部门内约4.3万名非内存工会成员可能左右结果。据韩国媒体报道，内部留言板显示员工强烈反对，认为协议偏袒内存部门而牺牲他人利益。三星半导体CEO Jun Young-hyun在周四的内部备忘录中敦促员工搁置冲突，但这场纠纷在当前可能给三星带来切实风险——彭博社预计2026年将是创纪录的一年，营业利润预计达330万亿韩元（约合2180亿美元）。

items.title: 768GB of cheap Intel Optane DIMM memory sticks used to run 1-trillion-parameter LLM on a system with a single GPU — local Kimi K2.5 install achieved roughly 4 tokens per second
items.description: A Redditor has caused a stir by coaxing a workstation build using Optane PMem DIMMs as RAM to run a 1-trillion parameter LLM.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter A Redditor has caused a stir by coaxing a workstation build using Optane PMem DIMMs as RAM to run a 1-trillion-parameter LLM. APFrisco explains in a mini tutorial/guide on the Local LLaMA subreddit how they bought some used Intel Optane Persistent Memory, acquired relatively cheaply second-hand, to “run a 1 trillion parameter model (in this case Kimi K2.5) locally at ~4 tokens/second” on their Xeon workstation.Computer build using Intel Optane Persistent Memory - Can run 1 trillion parameter model at over 4 tokens/sec from r/LocalLLaMACentral to the headlining feat was the Redditor’s sourcing of six Optane PMem (DCPMM) sticks. The discontinued memory format was designed to bridge the DRAM-SSD divide. While the 768GB of Optane (6x 128GB) does indeed offer far lower latency than the best NVMe SSDs, it is still two or three times slower than DRAM. These characteristics are still rather sweet for LLM inference frameworks, and the second-hand price was “much less than what the equivalent DRAM capacity would cost.” But, alas, Optane is dead, so this is an exotic solution.APFrisco’s hardware specs were given as follows:Latest Videos From You may like Micron begins sampling 256GB SOCAMM2 units for up to 2 TB of LPDDR5X per CPU $20,000 in 32GB RAM sticks saved from the dumpster are now worth a fortune Intel leans on LPDDR5X to dodge the global HBM crisis, leaked Crescent Island AI GPU pics reveal massive Xe3P core Intel Xeon Gold 6246 CPUTyan S5630GMRE-CGN motherboardAsus Dual GeForce RTX 3060 OC 12GB GPU6x 32GB Samsung 2666MHz DDR4 ECC DRAM sticks6x 128GB Intel Optane DCPMM PC4-2666 NMA1XBD128GQS persistent memory modulesWestern Digital WD SN850X 2TB M.2 2280 NVMe SSDASRock Steel Legend SL-850G 850W 80 PLUS GOLD & Cybenetics Platinum Fully Modular Power SupplySilverstone SST-GD08B (Black) Grandia Series Home Theater PC CaseThe build was configured with the Optane in memory mode and the Samsung DDR4 as cache.The software side of the equation relied on the aforementioned Kimi K2.5’s mixture-of-experts architecture. APFrisco used a hybrid GPU/CPU inference methodology with llama.cpp. Also, to optimize processing, the routing components were shoehorned into the 12GB GPU using llama.cpp’s 'override-tensor' flag.The Redditor is rather proud of the resulting ~4 tokens per second performance. “Given the fact that this is a trillion-parameter frontier-class model running on such a limited hardware budget, I would consider it to be a great success,” writes APFrisco. They go on to lament Intel’s withdrawal of Optane products.If you are interested in this rig rundown and what it achieved in terms of local LLM inference, you can find some more details about the configuration in the source post. Furthermore, APFrisco sticks around in the comments to answer questions. They also appear to benefit from recommendations about how to achieve even better results, given the foundation they have laid.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsThe bigger picture, though, seems to be that there is room for a memory product in the chasm between DRAM and SSDs, particularly for LLMs. Many expect that the gap will soon be bridged by the CXL (Compute Express Link) standard, which promises huge pools of affordable, byte‑addressable memory for these kinds of workloads. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: 768GB廉价英特尔傲腾DIMM内存条用于在单GPU系统上运行1万亿参数大模型——本地Kimi K2.5安装实现约每秒4个token
items.descriptionZh:
一名Reddit用户通过巧妙组合老旧硬件，在一台Xeon工作站上成功运行了拥有1万亿参数的LLM（大型语言模型），速度达到约4 tokens/秒，引发了社区热议。该用户（ID：APFrisco）在Local LLaMA子版块分享了一份小型教程/指南，详细介绍了如何利用二手Intel Optane Persistent Memory（Optane PMem，即英特尔傲腾持久内存）实现这一壮举。这些Optane内存条由于已被英特尔停产，在二手市场上价格相对低廉，但性能上恰好能满足大规模AI推理的特殊需求。

**核心技术与硬件配置**：APFrisco采用了6根128GB的Intel Optane DCPMM（数据中心持久内存模块），总计768GB。Optane是一种已停产的存储级内存技术，旨在填补DRAM（动态随机存取内存）与SSD（固态硬盘）之间的性能鸿沟。与最快的NVMe SSD相比，Optane的延迟要低得多，但仍比标准DRAM慢2-3倍。不过对于LLM推理框架而言，这种特性却恰到好处：Optane容量大、成本低（二手价远低于同等容量DRAM），且只需通过内存通道直接访问，不需要像SSD那样经过PCIe接口和文件系统开销，从而在“容量-成本-延迟”三角中取得了独特平衡。APFrisco的完整硬件配置包括：Intel Xeon Gold 6246 CPU、泰安S5630GMRE-CGN主板、华硕双风扇GeForce RTX 3060 OC 12GB显卡、6根三星32GB DDR4 ECC 2666MHz内存条（作为缓存）、6根Intel Optane DCPMM PC4-2666 128GB持久内存模块、西数SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD、ASRock 850W电源及银欣机箱。系统将Optane设置为内存模式（Memory Mode），DDR4则作为其缓存层，使CPU可以直接访问Optane上的海量数据。

**软件与推理优化**：软件层面，APFrisco选择了基于MoE（混合专家）架构的Kimi K2.5模型（1万亿参数）。推理框架采用llama.cpp，并使用了混合GPU/CPU推理方法。关键技巧在于：利用llama.cpp的`override-tensor`标志，将模型的“路由组件”（即专家路由层，通常体积较小但需快速访问）强制加载到仅有12GB显存的RTX 3060上，而将1万亿参数的其余部分（主要是各专家层的权重）分配到Optane内存中。这种“GPU做路由决策 + CPU/Optane做主要计算”的异构推理方案，使得系统能够真正以“本地”方式运行这个庞大的前沿模型。

**性能表现与对比**：最终实测速度约4 tokens/秒。APFrisco认为考虑到硬件预算极为有限（主要成本来自廉价的二手Optane和旧款Xeon），这一结果“堪称巨大成功”。作为对比，如果完全使用NVMe SSD进行模型加载（即纯CPU+SSD推理），速度可能低于1 token/秒；而若使用同等容量的纯DRAM（768GB DDR4），成本将高达数万元甚至十几万元。Optane提供了约10-20倍于NVMe SSD的随机访问速度，同时成本仅为DRAM的几分之一，使其成为“穷人的大容量内存”方案。当然，与高端企业级服务器中采用的TB级DDR4/DDR5光速推理相比，4 tokens/秒仍然十分缓慢，但对于个人爱好者而言已相当惊艳。

**技术影响与应用场景**：这一案例揭示了一个深层需求：在DRAM和SSD之间存在明显的性能与成本缺口，尤其是对于LLM这种需要海量、字节可寻址、低延迟内存的负载。英特尔曾试图用Optane填补这一空白，但最终因市场定位、成本和技术路线问题而停产。如今，业界普遍看好CXL（Compute Express Link）标准来填补这一空缺。CXL能够通过PCIe总线连接大容量内存扩展池，提供字节级可寻址、高带宽、低延迟的共享内存，而且可以使用更便宜的NAND闪存或其他新型介质。未来，CXL有望让普通工作站以相对低廉的成本运行万亿参数级别的模型，类似于APFrisco今天的Optane实验。此外，这一案例也证明，在MoE架构下，将少量关键路由层放在高速显存、大量专家层放在大容量慢速内存（Optane甚至未来CXL内存）的异构推理策略是可行的。

**总结**：APFrisco的“垃圾佬”式拼装，意外地展示了冷门硬件Optane在AI推理中的复活潜力，虽然它已退出历史舞台，但为下一代CXL内存技术提供了真实的应用场景证明。对于追求本地深度学习的极客而言，这一方案性价比极高——当然，前提是能找到合适的二手Optane和配套Xeon平台。APFrisco还在帖子评论区持续回答技术细节，并从其他用户那里获得了进一步优化性能的建议（例如调整torch的多线程设置、优化llama.cpp的分块策略等）。如果你想自己复现或了解更详细的配置，可以查看原始帖子。

history.title: Save almost $200 on a flagship AMD 9850X3D CPU and 9070 XT GPU with this Newegg combo bundle — AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D and Radeon RX 9070 XT can be yours at a great price
history.description: If you've been looking to build a 4K-ready but the prices during the AI boom has scared you off, we've got just the deal to start you off. You can grab AMD's top-tier Ryzen 9 9850X3D CPU and RX 9070 XT GPU for less than $1,000 right now on Newegg. You're getting a combined savings of almost $200 across both items.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter PC building might be going through a tumultuous period right now, but that doesn't mean the deals have stopped. Even the RAM amidst a RAM crisis can be found bundled with CPUs and a motherboard for cheap, but what about the graphics cards? GPUs are still the most expensive part of a gaming rig and, as such, we've hunted down an awesome, flagship-tier combo for you. You can get AMD's Ryzen 9 9850X3D processor with a Radeon RX 9070 XT bundled for just $978 on Newegg right now. Check out this deal on Newegg Save $196Intel CPU GPU Combo - AMD RYZEN 7 9850X3D with ASRock RX9070XT CL 16G: was $1,174.98 now $978.98 at NeweggAll-time low priceThis incredible deal at Newegg right now brings together the 9850X3D with the RX 9070 XT, a potent duo for a 4K-ready gaming PC and one that'll save you nearly $200 in total.View Deal The RX 9070 XT needs no introduction; it sits at the very top of our best GPUs roundup because it's a great GPU for 1440p and even 4K gaming. In traditional raster, it pretty much matches the RTX 5070 Ti across all resolutions, and is only about 10% slower when it comes to ray-traced workloads. Nvidia does have a richer driver suite with things like DLSS 4.5 (and the dreaded DLSS 5 on the way) and RTX HDR, but AMD's FSR 4 isn't far behind anymore.The RX 9070 XT has an MSRP of $600, which it rarely sits at. You're getting an ASRock Challenger variant in this bundle that costs $700 on its own right now. Like every other RX 9070 XT, this one has 64x RDNA 4-based Compute Units with 16GB of GDDR6 memory saturated across a 256-bit wide bus to deliver a 640 GB/s bandwidth. So, if you take into account the $200 in savings, you're essentially getting this card for just $500! Image 1 of 4(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware) Moving on to the other half of the deal, the Ryzen 9 9850X3D is a powerhouse of a CPU, featuring 8 cores and 16 threads backed up by 96MB of X3D-powered L3 cache. The chip is clocked at 4.7 GHz but can boost up to 5.6 GHz thanks to the 3D V-Cache being stacked underneath the CCDs on Zen 5. The 9850X3D is the best performing processor we've ever tested in gaming, faster than even the recently launched 9950X3D2.It retails for $500, but can be found for a little less across retailers — Newegg has it for $475 at the moment. If you actually track the price for both the CPU and GPU on PCPartPicker, the lowest price for either totals out to $1,060, which means paying just $978.98 on Newegg is still saving you money, technically making this an all-time low. So, go grab this deal before stock runs out and resume your PC building ambitions during the AI boom! If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: Newegg套装大促：旗舰AMD 9850X3D处理器与9070 XT显卡组合直降近200美元——AMD Ryzen 9 9850X3D和Radeon RX 9070 XT超值入手
history.descriptionZh:
Newegg近日推出了一款极具性价比的旗舰级PC硬件组合套装：将AMD Ryzen 9 9850X3D处理器与Radeon RX 9070 XT显卡捆绑销售，售价仅为978.98美元，相比单独购买节省了近200美元（原价1174.98美元）。在当前显卡价格依然高企、内存市场波动的背景下，这一组合为追求4K游戏体验的玩家提供了难得的入手机会。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
套装中的RX 9070 XT显卡基于AMD最新的RDNA 4架构，配备64个计算单元，搭载16GB GDDR6显存，通过256-bit位宽实现640 GB/s的带宽。该卡在传统光栅化性能上几乎与NVIDIA RTX 5070 Ti持平，仅光线追踪性能落后约10%。AMD的FSR 4超分辨率技术虽不及NVIDIA DLSS 4.5（以及即将到来的DLSS 5）和RTX HDR在驱动生态上的丰富度，但差距已显著缩小。处理器方面，Ryzen 9 9850X3D采用Zen 5架构，8核心16线程，核心创新在于将96MB的3D V-Cache堆叠在CCD下方，使L3缓存达到96MB，基础频率4.7 GHz，加速频率可达5.6 GHz。这一设计大幅降低了游戏中的数据延迟，使其成为Tom's Hardware测试过的游戏性能最强的处理器，甚至比近期发布的9950X3D2还要快。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
- **显卡**：RX 9070 XT官方建议零售价（MSRP）为600美元，但市场上实际售价常高于此。本套装中的ASRock Challenger版本单独售价为700美元，套装折扣后相当于仅花500美元购得。  
- **处理器**：Ryzen 9 9850X3D单独零售价为500美元，Newegg目前标价475美元。  
- **总价对比**：若在PCPartPicker上分别购买这两款硬件，最低总价为1060美元，而套装价978.98美元确实达到了历史新低。  
- **竞品对标**：RX 9070 XT在4K和1440P分辨率下表现优异，光栅化性能与RTX 5070 Ti旗鼓相当；CPU则在游戏负载中超越所有此前测试的型号，包括旗舰级9950X3D2。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
该组合瞄准高端游戏PC构建，尤其适合需要4K分辨率下流畅运行3A大作、同时要求处理器响应迅速的电竞玩家或内容创作者。得益于3D V-Cache技术，9850X3D在CPU密集型模拟、即时战略等游戏中优势明显；而RX 9070 XT的16GB大显存和RDNA 4架构，能应对高分辨率纹理和未来光追游戏需求。对于预算有限但渴望旗舰性能的用户，这一套装省下的近200美元可直接用于升级存储或散热设备。不过需注意，该优惠库存有限，建议有意者尽快下单。若需进一步节省开支，可关注Tom's Hardware提供的更多SSD、硬盘、显示器、显卡及CPU优惠页面。

history.title: Samsung's $400,000 payout for memory workers sparks revolt as other divisions get only $4,000, fueling intentional production slowdowns — internal resentment disrupts packaging operations, major AI chip project decisions to a complete halt
history.description: It’s understood that meetings are being canceled across Samsung's non-memory and shared business units.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 1 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Samsung's tentative profit-sharing deal with its largest labor union averted an 18-day strike just days ago, but the agreement has triggered internal conflict that’s now threatening the company's ability to ship AI memory on schedule, according to a Seoul Economic Daily report published yesterday.It’s understood that meetings are being canceled across Samsung's non-memory and shared business units. That work negligence has become widespread in the foundry and TSP (Test & Package) divisions, which handle the back-end packaging and testing work essential to producing high-bandwidth memory. One source told the publication that “decision-making on major projects has come to a complete halt,” as inter-departmental resentment deepens over the bonus gap.This disruption in TSP could be especially consequential for Samsung as it looks to ramp up its HBM4 production for Nvidia’s next-gen Rubin AI accelerators. TSP uses an integrated turnkey system that routes chips through its own foundry and packaging lines, and any slowdown in back-end operations will directly constrain HBM output as all three major memory producers are racing to fulfill hyperscaler orders.Latest Videos From You may like Samsung meeting transcripts show memory workers offered incredible 607% bonus worth $477,000, while logic chip staff get as little as 50% Samsung chip workers reject $340,000 one-time bonus, demand annual payouts like SK hynix's $900,000 Union rally causes Samsung fab production to plummet by 58% during night shift as workers demand up to $400,000 bonuses Another source speaking to the publication warned that continued negligence on production and verification lines could damage Samsung's customer relationships and jeopardize delivery commitments.The root of the conflict is a massive disparity in proposed payouts. Under the tentative deal, employees in Samsung's memory division stand to receive bonuses of roughly 600 million won (~$400,000). In contrast, workers in the DX (Device eXperience) division, which covers smartphones, TVs, and home appliances, would receive approximately 6 million won (~$4,000). The deal allocates 10.5% of the semiconductor division's operating profit as stock-based bonuses, with an additional 1.5% in cash.Workers outside the memory unit have pushed back hard, with a smaller union representing DX employees filing a court injunction this week to block the larger, chip-dominated union from handling collective bargaining. That union's membership surged from 3,000 to nearly 13,000 after the deal was announced. Separately, the Korea Shareholder Action Headquarters has threatened legal action, arguing the profit-linked bonus structure requires shareholder approval under Korean law.Union members began casting electronic ballots on Friday, with voting open through May 27. Ratification requires participation from more than half of eligible members and a majority yes vote, but approximately 43,000 non-memory union members within the DS division could swing the outcome. According to reports from Korea, internal message boards have shown strong opposition from workers who view the deal as favoring the memory unit at everyone else's expense.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsSamsung's semiconductor CEO, Jun Young-hyun, urged employees in an internal memo Thursday to move past the conflict, but the dispute now poses a tangible risk to Samsung during what Bloomberg estimates will be a record year, with 2026 operating profit projected at 330 trillion won (~$218 billion). Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 三星向内存工人支付40万美元奖金引发反抗，其他部门仅获4000美元，导致故意放慢生产速度——内部不满扰乱
history.descriptionZh:
三星与其最大工会达成的临时利润分享协议近日成功避免了一场持续18天的罢工，然而这一协议却引发了内部激烈冲突，据《首尔经济日报》昨日报道，这正威胁着三星按时交付AI内存的能力。据了解，三星非内存及共享业务部门的会议纷纷被取消，这种工作懈怠在负责高带宽内存（HBM）后端封装与测试的晶圆代工（Foundry）和TSP（测试与封装）部门已变得普遍。一位消息人士透露，“重大项目的决策已完全停滞”，部门间因奖金差距而产生的对立情绪日益加深。TSP环节的中断对三星尤为关键，因为它正计划为英伟达下一代Rubin AI加速器大规模生产HBM4内存。TSP采用一体化交钥匙系统，芯片需经过自有晶圆厂和封装线串联处理，后端运营的任何放缓都将直接限制HBM产出，而当前三大内存厂商正竞相满足超大规模数据中心客户的订单。

消息人士警告称，生产和验证线上的持续懈怠可能损害三星的客户关系，并危及交货承诺。冲突根源在于拟议奖金金额的巨大差异：根据临时协议，三星内存部门员工可获得约6亿韩元（约合40万美元）的奖金，而设备体验（DX）部门（涵盖智能手机、电视和家电）的员工仅能获得约600万韩元（约合4000美元）。协议规定，半导体部门营业利润的10.5%以股票形式发放奖金，另加1.5%现金。非内存部门员工强烈反对，代表DX员工的一个较小工会本周已向法院申请禁令，阻止由芯片部门主导的大型工会进行集体谈判。该大型工会的会员数在协议公布后从3000人激增至近13000人。此外，韩国股东行动总部威胁采取法律行动，认为这种与利润挂钩的奖金结构根据韩国法律需要股东批准。

工会成员于周五开始电子投票，至5月27日结束。批准需超过半数合格成员参与且多数赞成，但DS部门内约4.3万名非内存工会成员可能左右结果。据韩国媒体报道，内部留言板显示员工强烈反对，认为协议偏袒内存部门而牺牲他人利益。三星半导体CEO Jun Young-hyun在周四的内部备忘录中敦促员工搁置冲突，但这场纠纷在当前可能给三星带来切实风险——彭博社预计2026年将是创纪录的一年，营业利润预计达330万亿韩元（约合2180亿美元）。

history.title: 768GB of cheap Intel Optane DIMM memory sticks used to run 1-trillion-parameter LLM on a system with a single GPU — local Kimi K2.5 install achieved roughly 4 tokens per second
history.description: A Redditor has caused a stir by coaxing a workstation build using Optane PMem DIMMs as RAM to run a 1-trillion parameter LLM.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter A Redditor has caused a stir by coaxing a workstation build using Optane PMem DIMMs as RAM to run a 1-trillion-parameter LLM. APFrisco explains in a mini tutorial/guide on the Local LLaMA subreddit how they bought some used Intel Optane Persistent Memory, acquired relatively cheaply second-hand, to “run a 1 trillion parameter model (in this case Kimi K2.5) locally at ~4 tokens/second” on their Xeon workstation.Computer build using Intel Optane Persistent Memory - Can run 1 trillion parameter model at over 4 tokens/sec from r/LocalLLaMACentral to the headlining feat was the Redditor’s sourcing of six Optane PMem (DCPMM) sticks. The discontinued memory format was designed to bridge the DRAM-SSD divide. While the 768GB of Optane (6x 128GB) does indeed offer far lower latency than the best NVMe SSDs, it is still two or three times slower than DRAM. These characteristics are still rather sweet for LLM inference frameworks, and the second-hand price was “much less than what the equivalent DRAM capacity would cost.” But, alas, Optane is dead, so this is an exotic solution.APFrisco’s hardware specs were given as follows:Latest Videos From You may like Micron begins sampling 256GB SOCAMM2 units for up to 2 TB of LPDDR5X per CPU $20,000 in 32GB RAM sticks saved from the dumpster are now worth a fortune Intel leans on LPDDR5X to dodge the global HBM crisis, leaked Crescent Island AI GPU pics reveal massive Xe3P core Intel Xeon Gold 6246 CPUTyan S5630GMRE-CGN motherboardAsus Dual GeForce RTX 3060 OC 12GB GPU6x 32GB Samsung 2666MHz DDR4 ECC DRAM sticks6x 128GB Intel Optane DCPMM PC4-2666 NMA1XBD128GQS persistent memory modulesWestern Digital WD SN850X 2TB M.2 2280 NVMe SSDASRock Steel Legend SL-850G 850W 80 PLUS GOLD & Cybenetics Platinum Fully Modular Power SupplySilverstone SST-GD08B (Black) Grandia Series Home Theater PC CaseThe build was configured with the Optane in memory mode and the Samsung DDR4 as cache.The software side of the equation relied on the aforementioned Kimi K2.5’s mixture-of-experts architecture. APFrisco used a hybrid GPU/CPU inference methodology with llama.cpp. Also, to optimize processing, the routing components were shoehorned into the 12GB GPU using llama.cpp’s 'override-tensor' flag.The Redditor is rather proud of the resulting ~4 tokens per second performance. “Given the fact that this is a trillion-parameter frontier-class model running on such a limited hardware budget, I would consider it to be a great success,” writes APFrisco. They go on to lament Intel’s withdrawal of Optane products.If you are interested in this rig rundown and what it achieved in terms of local LLM inference, you can find some more details about the configuration in the source post. Furthermore, APFrisco sticks around in the comments to answer questions. They also appear to benefit from recommendations about how to achieve even better results, given the foundation they have laid.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsThe bigger picture, though, seems to be that there is room for a memory product in the chasm between DRAM and SSDs, particularly for LLMs. Many expect that the gap will soon be bridged by the CXL (Compute Express Link) standard, which promises huge pools of affordable, byte‑addressable memory for these kinds of workloads. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Mark Tyson
history.titleZh: 768GB廉价英特尔傲腾DIMM内存条用于在单GPU系统上运行1万亿参数大模型——本地Kimi K2.5安装实现约每秒4个token
history.descriptionZh:
一名Reddit用户通过巧妙组合老旧硬件，在一台Xeon工作站上成功运行了拥有1万亿参数的LLM（大型语言模型），速度达到约4 tokens/秒，引发了社区热议。该用户（ID：APFrisco）在Local LLaMA子版块分享了一份小型教程/指南，详细介绍了如何利用二手Intel Optane Persistent Memory（Optane PMem，即英特尔傲腾持久内存）实现这一壮举。这些Optane内存条由于已被英特尔停产，在二手市场上价格相对低廉，但性能上恰好能满足大规模AI推理的特殊需求。

**核心技术与硬件配置**：APFrisco采用了6根128GB的Intel Optane DCPMM（数据中心持久内存模块），总计768GB。Optane是一种已停产的存储级内存技术，旨在填补DRAM（动态随机存取内存）与SSD（固态硬盘）之间的性能鸿沟。与最快的NVMe SSD相比，Optane的延迟要低得多，但仍比标准DRAM慢2-3倍。不过对于LLM推理框架而言，这种特性却恰到好处：Optane容量大、成本低（二手价远低于同等容量DRAM），且只需通过内存通道直接访问，不需要像SSD那样经过PCIe接口和文件系统开销，从而在“容量-成本-延迟”三角中取得了独特平衡。APFrisco的完整硬件配置包括：Intel Xeon Gold 6246 CPU、泰安S5630GMRE-CGN主板、华硕双风扇GeForce RTX 3060 OC 12GB显卡、6根三星32GB DDR4 ECC 2666MHz内存条（作为缓存）、6根Intel Optane DCPMM PC4-2666 128GB持久内存模块、西数SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD、ASRock 850W电源及银欣机箱。系统将Optane设置为内存模式（Memory Mode），DDR4则作为其缓存层，使CPU可以直接访问Optane上的海量数据。

**软件与推理优化**：软件层面，APFrisco选择了基于MoE（混合专家）架构的Kimi K2.5模型（1万亿参数）。推理框架采用llama.cpp，并使用了混合GPU/CPU推理方法。关键技巧在于：利用llama.cpp的`override-tensor`标志，将模型的“路由组件”（即专家路由层，通常体积较小但需快速访问）强制加载到仅有12GB显存的RTX 3060上，而将1万亿参数的其余部分（主要是各专家层的权重）分配到Optane内存中。这种“GPU做路由决策 + CPU/Optane做主要计算”的异构推理方案，使得系统能够真正以“本地”方式运行这个庞大的前沿模型。

**性能表现与对比**：最终实测速度约4 tokens/秒。APFrisco认为考虑到硬件预算极为有限（主要成本来自廉价的二手Optane和旧款Xeon），这一结果“堪称巨大成功”。作为对比，如果完全使用NVMe SSD进行模型加载（即纯CPU+SSD推理），速度可能低于1 token/秒；而若使用同等容量的纯DRAM（768GB DDR4），成本将高达数万元甚至十几万元。Optane提供了约10-20倍于NVMe SSD的随机访问速度，同时成本仅为DRAM的几分之一，使其成为“穷人的大容量内存”方案。当然，与高端企业级服务器中采用的TB级DDR4/DDR5光速推理相比，4 tokens/秒仍然十分缓慢，但对于个人爱好者而言已相当惊艳。

**技术影响与应用场景**：这一案例揭示了一个深层需求：在DRAM和SSD之间存在明显的性能与成本缺口，尤其是对于LLM这种需要海量、字节可寻址、低延迟内存的负载。英特尔曾试图用Optane填补这一空白，但最终因市场定位、成本和技术路线问题而停产。如今，业界普遍看好CXL（Compute Express Link）标准来填补这一空缺。CXL能够通过PCIe总线连接大容量内存扩展池，提供字节级可寻址、高带宽、低延迟的共享内存，而且可以使用更便宜的NAND闪存或其他新型介质。未来，CXL有望让普通工作站以相对低廉的成本运行万亿参数级别的模型，类似于APFrisco今天的Optane实验。此外，这一案例也证明，在MoE架构下，将少量关键路由层放在高速显存、大量专家层放在大容量慢速内存（Optane甚至未来CXL内存）的异构推理策略是可行的。

**总结**：APFrisco的“垃圾佬”式拼装，意外地展示了冷门硬件Optane在AI推理中的复活潜力，虽然它已退出历史舞台，但为下一代CXL内存技术提供了真实的应用场景证明。对于追求本地深度学习的极客而言，这一方案性价比极高——当然，前提是能找到合适的二手Optane和配套Xeon平台。APFrisco还在帖子评论区持续回答技术细节，并从其他用户那里获得了进一步优化性能的建议（例如调整torch的多线程设置、优化llama.cpp的分块策略等）。如果你想自己复现或了解更详细的配置，可以查看原始帖子。
